title: Warm Spanish Oysters Paella
description: A warm and savory Spanish paella dish featuring fresh oysters, perfect for a hearty dinner. The crispy crust and flavorful broth are sure to delight your taste buds.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chicken broth, salt, and black pepper. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the saffron rice to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the oysters to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, until they start to open.
Cover the pan with a lid and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes, until the rice is cooked and the oysters are fully opened.
Remove the pan from the heat and stir in the lemon juice.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve hot.
